description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style handgun with a boxy, utilitarian frame and a distinctive, modern finish. The exterior is adorned with a bold, wavy pattern in black, white, red, and cyan, giving it a striking, almost digital appearance. The weapon features a prominent magazine well, a short barrel, and a folding wire stock at the rear. The grip is integrated into the lower receiver and appears to have a textured surface for improved handling. Visible controls include a fire selector switch, safety, and charging handle, along with various small buttons and levers. The overall design suggests a robust, tactical firearm suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, boxy submachine gun-style handgun with a bold, wavy black, white, red, and cyan pattern, featuring a folding wire stock and textured grip.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the barrel opening, front sight, and the patterned top rail, with the wire stock visible below.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the full length of the patterned slide, the fire selector, safety, and the folding wire stock, as well as the magazine and grip details.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip, with the patterned finish and control levers visible.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the ejection port, additional controls, and the continuation of the bold pattern, along with the magazine and grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is integrated into the lower receiver and features a contoured, ergonomic shape with a visible diagonal striped pattern that matches the rest of the frame. The surface appears textured for enhanced grip, likely made from a durable polymer, and is visually unified with the overall design. There are no visible finger grooves, but the grip's contouring suggests comfort and control. The patterning is bold and modern, with no visible logos or embellishments beyond the color scheme.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rectangular with rounded edges, providing ample space for finger access. It is of medium thickness and appears reinforced, with a smooth finish and no visible texturing or undercuts. The design is functional and straightforward, lacking any integrated accessories or decorative elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from the front of the frame. It has a smooth, matte finish with no visible threading, ports, or compensators. The exterior is unmarked and blends seamlessly with the rest of the firearm's design.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features a bold, wavy pattern in black, white, red, and cyan, covering most of its surface. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers, but there are small, stylized icons and selector markings near the fire selector and safety switch. These markings are minimal and integrated into the overall visual theme.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and rectangular, extending slightly below the grip. It has a smooth, untextured surface with no finger rest, flaring, or visible logos. The design is simple and functional, matching the utilitarian aesthetic of the firearm.
